desires: Secure the scholarship before Thursday so I can finally demand my roommates pay their share of rent without me having to beg.

goals.description: Complete the scholarship essay and upload all required files to secure funding before Thursday midnight.
goals.rationale: This is non-negotiable. Securing this money directly impacts my ability to enforce financial boundaries with my roommates, which aligns with my assertive nature. I'm not going to beg for rent anymore; I'm taking control of my resources. The deadline is hard-coded in my short-term planning horizon, so I'm ignoring any guilt about skipping social time tonight. Action now prevents future incompetence.

goals.description: Execute a single, uninterrupted 90-minute deep-work block on the application materials.
goals.rationale: My procrastination bias is killing me if I try to split this up. I need to push through the fatigue right now because waiting means more excuses later. I'll turn off notifications and just grind until the task is done or I hit zero focus capacity. No multitasking, no distractions.

goals.description: Skip the planned meal with cohort_3 and decline invitations to social gatherings for the next 4 days.
goals.rationale: Relationship maintenance is a low-priority distraction compared to achieving this win. Letting them down feels bad, but failing myself over a dinner date is unacceptable. I'll handle the awkwardness later; right now, protecting my academic standing and financial leverage takes precedence. I'm cutting the cord to maximize output.

agent.last_reasoning: Securing the scholarship is non-negotiable for my financial autonomy. This grind advances g1 immediately, leveraging my assertive drive to ignore social costs. I'll push through fatigue now; splitting it up invites future incompetence.

goals.description: Complete the scholarship essay and upload remaining documents to secure funding before Thursday.
goals.rationale: This directly aligns with my core value of 'achievement' and the need to prove reliability to the professor. The ~3-hour window is manageable within my short planning horizon, and ignoring the immediate urge for fun ('fun_now') ensures I don't look unreliable.

goals.description: Execute a single 45-minute focused block on the scholarship application without checking notifications or gaming.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature makes me vulnerable to distraction; setting a strict, short-duration boundary helps me maintain focus and avoid procrastination bias while preserving energy for later.
